note: Behavioural question bank. 'why_this_company' is dynamic — {{company}} is filled from the parsed JD; falls back to 'this company'. Competencies align with the tags used in seed_answer_bank.json so RAG retrieval matches the user's own prepared answers.

questions.question: Why are you interested in this role?
Why do you want to work at {{company}}?
Why are you interested in consulting?
What are your greatest strengths, and how have you applied them?
Tell me about a time you failed and what you learned.
Tell me about a time you led a team through a difficult situation.
Tell me about a time you had a conflict with a teammate and how you resolved it.
Tell me about a time you dealt with significant ambiguity.
Tell me about a time you influenced others without formal authority.
Tell me about a time you used data to make a decision.
Tell me about a time you delivered high-quality work under a tight deadline.
Tell me about a time you worked cross-functionally.
Tell me about a time you went beyond what was asked.
